case_title: MATTHEW BESANT VS. BEST BUY CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW BESANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CARLOS RUIZ, STORE MANAGER. DEFENDANT BEST BUY WAIVES SERVICE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $899.99 FILED BY BESANT, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BESANT, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $980.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
